tone: Familiar and consistent tone to encourage repeat visits
hook_formula: Exclusive offers for regular customers, highlighting the benefits of repeat visits
cta_style: Soft, non-pressuring call-to-action to encourage repeat business
visual_direction: Consistent branding, familiar environments, and loyalty program visuals
india_adjustment: Target 60-70% retention, with top performers at 75-80% and global averages at ~55%
dont: Never use FOMO or urgency language

tone: Exclusive and high-end tone to attract high-value customers
hook_formula: High-end offerings, exclusive deals, and premium services to attract high-value customers
cta_style: Direct and exclusive call-to-action to encourage high-end bookings
visual_direction: High-end visuals, premium branding, and exclusive environments
india_adjustment: Use Instagram and short-form video to drive discovery for 18-35 year olds
dont: Never use low-end or budget language

tone: Fun and social tone to attract young and social customers
hook_formula: Trending events, live music, and social activities to attract young and social customers
cta_style: Fun and social call-to-action to encourage group bookings and events
visual_direction: Vibrant and social visuals, trending events, and live music
india_adjustment: Use TikTok/Reels to drive discovery and increase weekend footfall
dont: Never use boring or static language
